title: G.M.C. (Grimmscraft)
description: Add leveling system and weapons to the game aswell as new ores and things to explore!
body:
Includes:
-
- Machines
- Consumables
  - Drinks
  - Food
- Weapons
  - Scyhes
  - Blades
  - Katanas
  - Swords
- New Ores
  - Tanium
- New Vanilla Toolsets
  - Paper
  - Coal
  - Quartz
  - Obsidian
  - Lapis
  - etc.
- Leveling & Perks
- Compressed Items
* And More To come

Note:
This mod has been discontinued and put place to Grimm's Mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/gsm](https://modrinth.com/mod/gsm)
